body.title: Resolve dual LearningPipeline: archivist vs librarian
body.result: InferenceAccumulator replaces LearningPipeline in archivist; librarian is canonical; alias preserves compat; ADR comment added
body.intention: I intend that there is exactly one learning pipeline class with a clear owner.
body.description:
Expert audit (Systems Architect) found two LearningPipeline classes: devices/archivist/learning_pipeline.py (enqueue/process_overnight) and devices/librarian/learning_pipeline.py (run_once/extract_facts). Different method signatures, different schema targets, unclear ownership. bootstrap_learning.py imports librarian version; devices/archivist/proxy.py imports archivist version. Unresolved split with no ADR.

**Affected files:** devices/archivist/learning_pipeline.py, devices/archivist/proxy.py, lab/claudecode/bootstrap_learning.py (if import needs updating)
**Design rules:** no duplicate classes; one canonical implementation per concept
**Scope boundary:** IN — determine canonical pipeline, retire the other, document ownership in a one-line ADR comment; OUT — functionality changes to the retained pipeline
**Completion criteria:** only one LearningPipeline class exists in the codebase; all callers import the same one; a one-line comment in the canonical file names the decision
